title: FeedbackEvent
description: Schema for a single feedback event in the BenchCore benchmark pack feedback loop.

event_id.description: Unique identifier for the feedback event.

session_id.description: Identifier for the session in which the feedback was collected.

source_id.description: Identifier of the source document or system component that generated the feedback.

signal_type.description: Whether the feedback was implicitly inferred or explicitly provided.

choice.description: The choice or preference expressed by the feedback signal.

position_bias_correction_applied.description: Whether position bias correction was applied to this event.

smoothing_applied.description: Whether smoothing was applied to this event.

reliability_score.description: Estimated reliability of the feedback signal (1.0 = most reliable).

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the feedback event was recorded.
